{{Event Header|StS2 Slippery Bridge.png}} {{E|Slippery Bridge|2}} is an {{2|Events|Event}} that can be found in any {{2|Acts|Act}}. == Options == {{Frame|Overcome}} [Specific card] is removed from your deck.
{{Frame|Hold On}} {{TS|negative||Lose 3 HP.}} The card in the above option is randomized. === Mechanics === * Choosing Hold On replaces the listed card with another chosen at random, and the event continues to ask you to choose between these options until you choose Overcome. * Each time Hold On is selected, the HP cost increases by 1. * The card is chosen randomly from all your cards without {{2|Keywords#Card_Keywords|Eternal}}. * The first card chosen will never be {{2|Cards#Card_Rarity|Basic}} rarity (unless all of your cards are Basic). Basic cards can be chosen during rerolls. * The same card will never be chosen twice in a row (unless it's the only removable card in your deck). == Conditions == * Only appears from floor 7 onward, and only if you have at least 1 card that can be removed. == Dialogue ==
While crossing a rickety wooden bridge, there is a sudden {{TS|blue|shake|torrent of rain}}. {{TS|purple|up|Massive gusts of wind}} buffet you, threatening to end your journey.
{{Frame|Overcome}}
I hate bridges.
{{Frame|Hold On (3 HP))}}
{{TS||shake|You're holding on!}}
{{Frame|Hold On (4 HP))}}
Still... Holding... ooOOONN!!!!
{{Frame|Hold On (5 HP))}}
AHHHH!?!!!
{{Frame|Hold On (6 HP))}}
I CAN DO THIS!!!
{{Frame|Hold On (7 HP))}}
NOOOOOooo
{{Frame|Hold On (8 HP))}}
WHAT AM I DOING!?
{{Frame|Hold On (9 HP))}}
!!!!!!!!!!!!!... !!! !!!!!!!! !!!!!!!!!!!?? !!!!!!!!!
{{Frame|Hold On (10 HP))}}
The developer would like to inform you that there is no additional text for players who have held on this long. We apologize for the inconvenience.
== Update History == * '''Early Access v0.104.0''' **Changed Slippery Bridge: Will no longer offer to remove the same card multiple times unless it has already offered to remove all other cards in your deck at least once. * '''Early Access v0.98''' ** Added Slippery Bridge to the game. [[Category:Events]] [[Category:Slay the Spire 2 Content]]
